Use the Go `aether` CLI as the source of truth.

- Execute `AETHER_OUTPUT_MODE=visual aether reference-index $ARGUMENTS` directly.
- Do not write reference index files by hand from this command spec.
- If docs and runtime disagree, runtime wins.
- Keep any wrapper summary to at most 2 short sentences.
